capture.lead: Write what you want to remember right now.
capture.placeholder: What happened today, judgments or details to keep…
capture.lock_hint: Memory is consolidating — capture is temporarily locked.
capture.locked: Memory is consolidating (dream_locked). Try again shortly.
capture.api_down: Cannot reach Engram API (default localhost:8787). Run: cd server && bun run start
consolidate.lead: Dream a report first; commit long-term memory only after human review.
advice.none: Status unavailable. Confirm the server is running on :8787.
advice.lock: Dream/commit in progress — please wait. Capture remains allowed during pending_review.
advice.pending_review: Pending dream: read the report, then Approve (write L2 and clear this round's L1) or Discard / Dream again (replace).
advice.l1_clear_pending: Committed but L1 clear failed — Approve again to retry clear only.
advice.dream_incomplete: Last extract/materialize failed (L1 kept). You can retry Dream.
advice.dlq: {count} DLQ entr(y/ies) need manual handling; Dream can continue.
advice.never_dreamed: No short-term memory yet. Capture a few notes first.
advice.l1_empty: L1 is empty — nothing to consolidate.
advice.ready: L1 has content; Dream to produce a pending report.
dream.l1_empty: L1 is empty — nothing to Dream.
dream.approve_empty: Approved: no L2 writes; this round's L1 cleared.
dream.approve_retry_clear: Committed; L1 clear incomplete — Approve once more.
dream.approve_ok: Wrote {count} path(s) and cleared this round's L1.
recall.lead: Recall a context packet by keyword.
